game_info.title: Underworld Tactics
game_info.concept:
"Blanket recommendation for this one." - Pocket Tactics (5 stars)

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/hoplite/id782438457

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

"Blanket recommendation for this one." - Pocket Tactics (5 stars)

"It's very simple to learn, but there's a huge amount of depth to the game" - Touch Arcade (5 stars)


Hoplite is a turn-based strategy game focusing on tactical movement around small maps.

This game is designed to be hard, yet fair.  You'll need to think before you act if you hope to win.  Every move counts!

Quest Mode:
• Make strategical choices to upgrade your abilities as you dive deeper into the underworld.
• Earn achievements and unlock access to new upgrades.
• Procedurally generated levels give a new experience every play.
• Challenge your friends and see how you rank on the leaderboard.

Challenge mode:
• Jump straight into the action with a randomized set of upgrades.
• Try to beat the daily challenge or play predetermined challenges at two difficulty levels.
game_info.description:
Underworld Tactics is a turn-based tactical strategy game set on a hexagonal grid. You play as a lone warrior descending into the depths of a procedurally generated underworld. Your goal is to navigate through dangerous terrain, defeat or outmaneuver enemies, and reach the glowing portal to advance to the next level.

Tactical depth comes from positioning and managing your abilities. You can move one tile at a time, attack enemies by bumping into them, or perform a long-range Jump to escape danger or close the gap. Watch your health and choose your moves wisely—enemies will retaliate!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the selection cursor
Space: Confirm action (Move to selected tile / Attack enemy)
Shift + Space: Perform Jump (Move 2 tiles, jumping over obstacles/enemies)
Z: Wait / Skip turn
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Resume
R: Restart (from Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Survival Test. The automated bot controls the player to survive as long as possible by avoiding enemies and staying on safe ground.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot evaluates all adjacent moves. It assigns a score to each move based on distance to enemies (prefer far), health items (prefer close), and lava (avoid). It executes the move with the highest safety score.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 50 turns or clear the first level without taking lethal damage.

TEST_2.test_description: Speedrun Test. The bot attempts to reach the exit portal as quickly as possible.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot calculates the shortest path to the exit using A* algorithm. It aggressively moves along the path, attacking enemies only if they block the way, ignoring safety to minimize turn count.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should reach the exit portal within 20 turns, ignoring damage unless health is critical.
